name: ABS_VALUE
description: Computes the absolute value of the input signal
xmlExample:
<BasicBlock id="b1" parent="0:2:0" interfaceFunctionName="ABS_VALUE" blockType="c" simulationFunctionName="absolute_value" simulationFunctionType="C_OR_FORTRAN" style="ABS_VALUE">
  <ScilabString as="exprs" height="1" width="1">
    <data line="0" column="0" value="1"/>
  </ScilabString>
  <ScilabDouble as="realParameters" height="0" width="0"/>
  <ScilabDouble as="integerParameters" height="0" width="0"/>
  <mxGeometry as="geometry" x="100.0" y="100.0" width="40.0" height="40.0"/>
</BasicBlock>
anomalies: nbZerosCrossing=-1 indicates default behavior (use solver default)
Simple block with exactly 1 input and 1 output
criticalRules: Simple block with exactly 1 input and 1 output
commonUses: Ensuring positive values for downstream blocks
